# Asaptic Cross-Standard (asaptic.com/standard)
## LLM-friendly index of China-export compliance comparisons

Structured, source-linked comparisons of the gap between Chinese GB standards and a destination market’s MANDATORY requirements, per product × market. Trilingual EN / 简体中文 / 繁體中文.

Browse all comparisons: https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
Methodology: https://asaptic.com/standard/methodology
Provenance: data is AI-compiled and cross-checked by multiple AI models; it is NOT human-verified. Informational only — confirm every requirement with the official regulator or standards body and a qualified professional before relying on it. Not legal, certification, customs, or market-access advice.

### Comparison index (393 live comparisons · 95 destination markets · 23 product categories)
- Air-source heat pump (China → AUSTRALIA, CANADA, EU, INDIA, JAPAN, MEXICO, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
- Battery energy storage (BESS) (China → ALGERIA, ANGOLA, ARGENTINA, ARMENIA, AUSTRALIA, AZERBAIJAN, BAHRAIN, BANGLADESH, BENIN, BOLIVIA, BOTSWANA, BRAZIL, BRUNEI, BURKINA FASO, CAMBODIA, CAMEROON, CANADA, CHILE, COLOMBIA, CONGO BRAZZAVILLE, COSTA RICA, COTE DIVOIRE, DOMINICAN REPUBLIC, ECUADOR, EGYPT, EL SALVADOR, ETHIOPIA, EU, GABON, GAMBIA, GEORGIA, GHANA, GUATEMALA, GUINEA, GUYANA, HONDURAS, INDIA, INDONESIA, IRAQ, ISRAEL, JAPAN, JORDAN, KAZAKHSTAN, KENYA, KUWAIT, KYRGYZSTAN, LAOS, LEBANON, LIBERIA, MADAGASCAR, MALAWI, MALAYSIA, MALI, MAURITANIA, MEXICO, MONGOLIA, MOROCCO, MOZAMBIQUE, NAMIBIA, NEPAL, NEW ZEALAND, NICARAGUA, NIGER, NIGERIA, OMAN, PAKISTAN, PANAMA, PARAGUAY, PERU, PHILIPPINES, QATAR, RWANDA, SAUDI, SENEGAL, SIERRA LEONE, SINGAPORE, SOUTH AFRICA, SOUTH KOREA, SRI LANKA, SURINAME, TAJIKISTAN, TANZANIA, THAILAND, TOGO, TUNISIA, TURKEY, UAE, UGANDA, UK, URUGUAY, US, UZBEKISTAN, VIETNAM, ZAMBIA, ZIMBABWE): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse

- Sodium-ion battery storage (Na-ion) (China → EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
- Textiles & apparel (China → AUSTRALIA, CANADA, EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
- Toys & children’s products (China → AUSTRALIA, CANADA, EU, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
- Water electrolyzer (green hydrogen, AEM/PEM) (China → EU, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse
- Wireless / IoT device (China → AUSTRALIA, CANADA, EU, INDIA, UK, US): https://asaptic.com/standard/browse

Machine-readable JSON per comparison: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/<slug>.json (index: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/index.json).

Each page leads with a one-line Compliance Verdict, then a gap table (target requirement vs closest Chinese GB equivalent vs the gap), with an official source + access date per row.
